intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How the YouTube Algorithm Works. YouTube personalizes Home, Suggested, and Search using viewer satisfaction signals. Creators influence outcomes through packaging and retention — not secret hacks or monetization guarantees.
mainSummary: YouTube personalizes Home, Suggested, and Search using viewer satisfaction signals. Creators influence outcomes through packaging and retention — not secret hacks or monetization guarantees.
